userStories.title: Configure Frosted Glass Parameters
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI workflow author, I want to control how heavily frosted and blurred the glass appears so that I can set anything from a light haze to a fully opaque white frost.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Node exposes five numeric inputs: `frost_intensity` (FLOAT, 0.0–1.0, default 0.5),
Each widget accepts the full specified range without clamping errors.
Node output is typed `EFFECT_PARAMS` and carries

userStories.title: Live WebGL2 Preview in Node
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI workflow author, I want to see the frosted glass distortion animated in the node widget so that I can judge the look without running the full pipeline.

acceptanceCriteria.text: A canvas widget is mounted inside the `CoolFrostedGlassEffect` node, showing
The preview animates (`u_time` drives subtle noise evolution — frost is not
Changing any parameter widget updates the preview within one animation frame.

userStories.title: Integration with VideoGenerator
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI workflow author, I want to connect `CoolFrostedGlassEffect` to `CoolVideoGenerator` alongside other effects so that the frosted look is applied consistently across every frame of the output video.

userStories.title: Directional Blur Quality
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI workflow author, I want the blur to look like light scattered through ground glass, not a simple box blur so that the result is visually convincing even at large blur radii.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The blur samples at least 8 offset directions per pixel, with offsets perturbed
